icp_description: A mid-sized hospital with a dedicated IT team, looking to improve cybersecurity posture and protect patient data. The ideal customer has a mix of on-premises and cloud-based infrastructure, and is subject to regular HIPAA audits. They are looking for a trusted cybersecurity partner to help them navigate the complex regulatory landscape and stay ahead of emerging threats.
assumptions_notes: Assuming average hospital size and IT budget, with a moderate level of cybersecurity awareness and investment.

top_pain_points.description: Unauthorized access to sensitive patient data, resulting in financial and reputational damage.
Malicious software that encrypts hospital data, demanding payment in exchange for decryption keys.
Failure to meet HIPAA and other regulatory requirements, resulting in fines and reputational damage.
